files.patch:
@@ -876,0 +876,5 @@
+    ifeq ($(OPENJDK_TARGET_CPU_BITS), 32)
+      # on 32b windows, the old  msvsc do not understand inline, unluckily
+      # there is wrong detection in freetype 2.14 to use only __inline in such case
+      BUILD_LIBFREETYPE_CFLAGS += -Dinline=__inline
+    endif
@@ -888,1 +893,1 @@
-          -DFT2_BUILD_LIBRARY -Dinline=__inline, \
+          -DFT2_BUILD_LIBRARY, \
